chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1928 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1 2. For hearing of Misc. No.9560/2025 3. For hearing of main case 17.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aleem, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner shall seek remedy before the forum of appropriate statutory jurisdiction hence does not press this petition, which is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
